videos.title: Conor McGregor Devastating Knee Injury (HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED)
videos.summary_source_text:
Conor McGregor Devastating Knee Injury (HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED) Conor McGregor’s long-awaited return to the Octagon ended in devastating fashion tonight when his knee buckled during the opening moments of his UFC 329 rematch against Max Holloway.

McGregor attempted a jumping roundhouse kick, came down awkwardly on the supporting leg and immediately appeared to lose stability in the knee. He tried to continue, but the leg could no longer support him and the fight was stopped just 69 seconds into the first round.

UFC President Dana White said following the fight that the initial belief is that McGregor suffered a torn ACL. Until MRI results are released, however, the exact structures involved and the full severity of the injury remain unconfirmed.

As a physical therapist, I’m breaking down the injury frame by frame to show you the likely mechanism. We’ll look at the position of McGregor’s planted foot, the rotation occurring through the lower leg, the direction the knee collapsed and why this combination can place enormous stress on the ACL, MCL and meniscus.

I’ll also explain why an athlete can sometimes initially try to continue after an ACL injury, what additional damage doctors will be looking for and what a realistic recovery could mean for McGregor’s fighting future.

In an unbelievable twist, McGregor also tore his ACL during his original 2013 fight against Max Holloway. That night, he managed to finish the fight and earn a unanimous-decision victory. Thirteen years later, another knee injury against the same opponent brought his comeback to an abrupt and heartbreaking end.

This video is an educational analysis based on the visible injury mechanism and currently available reports. A definitive diagnosis can only be made following an examination and appropriate medical imaging.

And reaction to Denver’s Summer League win The second Denver Nuggets Summer League game is in the books and Harrison Wind and Brendan Vogt give their analysis of how Bryce Hopkins, KJ Simpson and the rest of how the the team played. Its Custom Routers split work across different models, while the Abacus Supercomputer gives agents an always-on cloud machine with root access. Together, they can inspect repositories, build complete apps, create databases, debug errors, deploy public services, host open models, and keep autonomous systems running after the conversation ends.

How to Fix your Metabolism Naturally Every day I see people struggling with metabolic health, but the body hasn't forgotten what it's designed to do. When it's given proper nutrition and the burden of toxins is reduced, it has an incredible ability to function the way it was intended. That's why building meals around real, minimally processed food is such an important place to start. The habits you build today can shape your health for years to come.

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. videos.title: Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Best from day three at the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Saturday | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Saturday | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Saturday at the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, featuring Rory Mcilroy, Matt Fitzpatrick, Wyndham Clark and Chris Gotterup, among others. After a fog delay pushed ahead Round 3 starting times, play was ultimately suspended due to fog before the completion of play. Round 3 will conclude Sunday.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

videos.title: THE TRUTH ABOUT EGGS YOUR DOCTOR NEVER EXPLAINED | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
THE TRUTH ABOUT EGGS YOUR DOCTOR NEVER EXPLAINED | Dr. Mandell Eggs have been misunderstood for decades, and many people still avoid them because they’re afraid of cholesterol. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains the truth about eggs, cholesterol, and heart health, including why cholesterol is essential for every cell in your body, hormone production, vitamin D production, bile acids, brain health, and overall function. You’ll learn how the liver makes most of the cholesterol your body needs, why dietary cholesterol from eggs does not affect everyone the same way, and why the real problem is often not the egg itself but the overall lifestyle around it. Eggs provide high-quality protein, all nine essential amino acids, choline for brain and nerve health, lutein and zeaxanthin for eye support, vitamin A, vitamin D, vitamin B12, selenium, and many important nutrients found mostly in the yolk. This video also explains why you should look at the entire meal, not just the egg, because eggs eaten with vegetables, avocado, fruit, and whole foods are very different from eggs eaten with bacon, sausage, pastries, sugary cereals, fried potatoes, and processed foods. Dr. Mandell also discusses healthy ways to prepare eggs, including boiling, poaching, and gently scrambling, while avoiding burning or overcooking them. For most healthy people, eggs should not be feared, but people with familial hypercholesterolemia, certain medical conditions, or specific doctor recommendations should follow professional guidance. The goal is to stop fearing one natural food and start understanding the bigger picture of nutrition, movement, sleep, stress, blood sugar, metabolism, and heart health.

*********************************

videos.title: Why lower-body lead improves sequencing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why lower-body lead improves sequencing #golfswing #golftips Great players begin the downswing by leading with the lower body, creating separation between the hips and the upper body. That separation allows the club to shallow and sequence more efficiently into impact. This drill, often used by Dave Phillips, helps golfers feel the correct order and build better timing.
If downswing sequencing or shallowing feels difficult, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear structure to improve transition and strike consistency.

videos.title: Hickory golf clubs EXPOSED my golf faults!
videos.summary_source_text:
Hickory golf clubs EXPOSED my golf faults! What happens when you take 100 year old hickory golf clubs to Italy's number one golf course?

In this video, I put traditional hickory clubs to the test on one of the finest golf courses in Europe to see how they compare to modern equipment. From the tee shots to the approach shots, you'll discover the challenges, surprises, and lessons these historic clubs can teach today's golfers.

Many golfers believe modern technology is the key to better golf, but playing with hickory clubs quickly reveals the fundamentals of great ball striking, tempo, rhythm, and shot making. Along the way, I'll share what I learned, how these clubs performed under pressure, and whether there are any swing secrets modern golfers can take from the game’s past.

If you've ever wondered how golfers played the game a century ago, or whether old equipment can actually improve your understanding of the golf swing, this is a round you won't want to miss.

Let me know in the comments if you would try a round with hickory clubs and what golf challenge you'd like to see next.

OpenAI just released GPT-5.6 Sol, but is it actually the best AI model?

After reading OpenAI's launch documentation, System Card, pricing tables, benchmark reports, and independent performance tests, I found something surprising: GPT-5.6 Sol doesn't win every benchmark—and for many workloads, Terra may actually be the better choice.

In this deep dive, we'll cover:

videos.title: Dry. Your. Wedges. 💧Honestly, before we did this test, I didn’t dry mine, either.
videos.summary_source_text:
Dry. Your. Wedges. 💧Honestly, before we did this test, I didn’t dry mine, either. But, after seeing these results I don’t play without a towel on hand

Our wedge testing revealed some huge changes in spin rates and launch angles when moisture is introduced - affecting your distances.

You and I both know trusting your yardages is key to scoring.

👉🏾👉🏾👉🏾 Almost 100% of the shots you hit in a round of golf will have SOME moisture on either the club, ground or ball.

Consistent spin is very important can be the difference between a 5 ft putt and a 20-ft putt.

WET WEDGE DATA:
- 20 testers
- 18 wedges
- 17,000 shots
- @titleist Pro V1
- @foresightsports QC Quad

📍SPIN = 30% spin loss ⬇️
📍LAUNCH: 4.6 degree higher ⬆️

* The worst wedges in this test lost 60% spin
* The best wedge was the @PingTour Glide 4.0

THE TAKEAWAY:
If you are losing 65% spin, consistent distance control is unlikely. If your approach shot is not spinning, you’ll probably see your ball end up farther from the hole than you expect.

The good news is that the best-performing wedges are almost identical under wet conditions 🤝

Keep this in mind next time you’re in the market for a new wedge

Hope this helps 🙏🏽 But, after seeing these results I don’t play without a towel on hand

videos.title: ChatGPT’s Latest Update Is MASSIVE
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT’s Latest Update Is MASSIVE OpenAI just dropped not one but SIX huge new upgrades. Here's the breakdown of them all: 

- GPT-5.6: The new flagship model is faster, cheaper, and capable of building entire games, slide decks, and complex software from a single prompt.

- Sol, Terra, & Luna: GPT-5.6 now comes in three variants. You can slide between Sol (maximum power), Terra, and Luna (prioritizing speed and lower credit use) depending on your budget and task.

- The "Super App": OpenAI is combining ChatGPT, Codex, and their AI browser into 1 app. It has a new Work Mode feature that acts as an autonomous assistant that can scan your emails, calendar, Slack, and documents to prioritize and complete tasks for you.

- ChatGPT Sites: A new tool that lets you prompt full websites and apps into existence, handling everything from code and databases to hosting and publishing.

Which of these new features are you most excited to try first? Let me know in the comments! 👇

videos.title: Tuck And Turn On-Plane Drill – Blue Brick
videos.summary_source_text:
Tuck And Turn On-Plane Drill – Blue Brick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Nothing gets you on plane faster than the tuck and turn drill.

This quick tip shows the full move: elbow starts out in the backswing, tucks in transition, and you turn on through — creating natural lag and getting the club coming from the inside every time.

After practicing this feel, your club will be swinging perfectly on plane, giving you more consistency and more speed through impact.

We used the Blue Brick to confirm the on-plane path during the drill.

Like this video if you're adding this to your practice, and check the link in my bio for the Blue Brick.

If you've tried every upper body fix and still can't stop standing up through impact, the problem is probably starting from the ground. Eric Cogorno breaks down the lower body chain reaction — trail foot, trail knee, lead hip, upper body — that high handicap golfers get wrong and shows exactly how to fix it with one simple sequence. Watch how Adam Scott and Rory McIlroy use their trail knee and lead hip depth to stay down at impact, and how the alignment rod drill gives you the same feel immediately. If you leave this video without trying the trail toe drill, you're leaving consistency on the table.
What You'll Learn:

What You'll Learn:
• Why incorrect trail foot position causes thin shots, topped balls, and standing up through impact
• How the trail foot controls the knee, hip, and entire lower body chain reaction in the golf swing
• The trail toe fix: pushing off the inside of the big toe to keep the lead hip deep at impact
• The trail knee drill for closing the gap and training correct knee path through the ball
• Why lead hip depth is the real key to staying down at impact for high handicap golfers
• The four-step sequence: trail toe, trail knee, lead hip, upper body — layered piece by piece
• How Adam Scott and Rory McIlroy use trail knee and hip depth that most high handicap golfers never learn
• The alignment rod drill for training correct knee path so your lower body stops leaking toward the ball

videos.title: Did the Cowboys Build the NFL's Best Situation for Dak Prescott?
videos.summary_source_text:
Did the Cowboys Build the NFL's Best Situation for Dak Prescott? Are the Dallas Cowboys finally giving Dak Prescott everything he needs to succeed?

The DLLS Cowboys Podcast breaks down which NFL teams have done the best job building around their quarterback heading into the 2026 season—and the Cowboys land in the top tier. 🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4v3AKKA

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Benefits of bone broth:
• Provides collagen to support healthy arteries
• Rich in glycine, a key amino acid for collagen production
• Supports healthy blood vessel structure
• Supports the body’s natural antioxidant production
• Supports a healthy sleep cycle

Bone broth is easy to make at home or can be purchased ready to enjoy, making it a simple way to add more collagen and glycine to your diet.

videos.title: If You Struggle With Chipping, Just Do This Before Every Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
If You Struggle With Chipping, Just Do This Before Every Shot You can practise chipping for hours...

...and still stand over one simple shot wondering whether it's going to be thin, fat... or perfect.

That uncertainty destroys confidence around the greens.
One bad chip turns into two. Before long, you're trying to guide the club instead of trusting it.
The frustrating part is, you're probably trying to do exactly what feels natural.

And that's the very thing making chipping so difficult.

In this short game lesson, Danny Maude shows you the one chipping technique that works for 70–80% of chip shots around the green—from tight lies to thick rough. It's a simple change in the way you think about the shot that encourages your body to produce clean, consistent contact without filling your head with technical positions.

If you've ever struggled with fat chips, thin chips or simply lost confidence around the greens, I think this simple golf lesson could really help.

In this video you'll learn

✅ Why most golfers struggle with chipping (even after practising)

✅ The hidden mistake that causes fat and thin chip shots

✅ Why better golfers use loft very differently from amateurs

✅ A simple movement that almost forces great contact

✅ How to play the same technique from tight lies and rough

✅ Why changing the problem your body is trying to solve can transform your short game

If you enjoyed this lesson, you'll love my AI Golf Coach.

Simply record your golf swing and the app analyses your technique, identifies what's holding you back, then gives you the exact lesson and practice drill you need to improve.

No searching through hundreds of YouTube videos.

Just personalised coaching, exactly when you need it.

👉 Start your FREE 2-week trial here:
https://www.dannymaude.com/Swing-coach-app

You are just 2 minutes away from knowing the exact fault in your golf swing and how to fix it.

---

videos.title: Eggs Reduce Alzheimer’s Risk By 47% (Here’s What They Don’t Tell You)
videos.summary_source_text:
Eggs Reduce Alzheimer’s Risk By 47% (Here’s What They Don’t Tell You) Can eggs reduce Alzheimer’s risk by 47%? Eggs are excellent for cognitive health, but there’s more to the story. Discover the connection between eggs and Alzheimer’s disease, how eggs support brain health, and whether they’re a useful tool for dementia prevention.

0:00 Eggs and dementia
1:30 Egg and brain health
2:35 Choline and brain health
3:38 Lutein in eggs
4:09 What is Alzheimer’s?
6:35 Egg nutrition facts
7:08 Eggs and cholesterol
8:42 Pasture-raised eggs vs. conventional eggs

🌟 Download Dr. Berg’s Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4aOzXWV

Watch these next for more on brain health and dementia prevention: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/fM-pyJQKwiI
▶️ https://youtu.be/OErFtjHismU
▶️ https://youtu.be/XHNOAvhkr5Q

Check out this article for more ways to support memory and cognitive health: https://www.drberg.com/blog/brain-detox

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

When new research is presented, it’s important to look beyond the headlines. Read the study carefully, see what the researchers are actually comparing, and ask questions like who funded the research.

Eggs contain more than 850 proteins and are one of the richest dietary sources of choline. Just two eggs provide about 300 mg of choline.

Choline is an essential building block for acetylcholine, a neurotransmitter that supports communication between neurons. Many Alzheimer’s medications work by slowing the breakdown of acetylcholine. Eggs also contain lutein, another important nutrient that supports brain health and cognitive health.

Eggs are true brain food, providing high-quality protein, choline, lutein, B vitamins, folate, iodine, selenium, trace minerals, and omega-3 fatty acids. These nutrients support brain health and may play a role in dementia prevention.

https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26054031/ 
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15673620/

https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5487843/

1998 vs 2023 Driver... How much have they changed 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Short Game Essentials: Stop Duffing Your Chip Shots Use these golf short game basics to give yourself the best possible platform from which to hit better chip shots and get up and down more often. 

Lots of amateurs hit bad chip / pitch shots due to poor fundamentals which encourage them to strike their shots poorly. Strike your short game shots like a pro and increase your control around the greens with these easy-to-follow short game tips. videos.title: New Porsche 911: Single Turbo v Twin Turbo DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
New Porsche 911: Single Turbo v Twin Turbo DRAG RACE We’re drag racing a new Porsche 911 Turbo S against a new Porsche 911 GTS over the quarter-mile & half-mile. We’ll also compare the two in a brake test from 100mph. 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-11-07

It’s time for a Porsche vs Porsche drag race! 

We’ve got Mat in the new Porsche 911 Turbo S, and he wants to see just how different the performance is compared to the new first Porsche 911 hybrid - the new 911 GTS. 

The result may seem like a forgone conclusion, but will the GTS prove tough opposition for the Turbo? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

Starting with the GTS, it’s powered by a 3.6-litre hybrid with a single electric turbo. It produces 541hp and 610Nm, and it weighs in at 1,595kg. As new, it costs around £139,400. 

Then we come to the Turbo S. It’s powered by the same engine, but in this instance it has two electric turbos! These work together to put down 711hp and 800Nm, and it tips the scales at 1,725kg. As new, it’s just shy of £200,000, costing £199,100. 

So the Turbo S is up on power, but it’s also the heavier of the two cars - could this prove decisive?! There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE! We’re drag racing a new Porsche 911 Turbo S against a new Porsche 911 GTS over the quarter-mile & half-mile. We’ll also compare the two in a brake test from 100mph. 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-11-07

videos.summary_source_text:

An ALLCITY Network Production

Texas Rangers star Corey Seager continues to miss time because of a lower-back issue, and frustration is mounting among the team’s fans. He’s frustrated to, but he told DLLS Sports exclusively that he expects to play again this season after getting a plan from a back specialist. His mounting health issues come at a tricky time for the team, which is in first place in the American League West after a narrow escape Thursday against the Angels. The trade deadline is approaching, and the Rangers might went to get out from under Seager’s massive contract because of the medicals. He’s also a really good hitter when healthy. It’s one of a few dilemmas facing the team as they play their final series before the All-Star break against the rival Astros.

videos.title: 10.07.26 - RIFT Education Day with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
10.07.26 - RIFT Education Day with Shavez RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: Hindi - 10.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 10.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: Slice to Draw in ONE Lesson #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Slice to Draw in ONE Lesson #golfswing #golftips John’s club was going under the plane in the backswing and over the top on the way down — leading to pulls and slices. While his path stayed consistent, his clubface wasn’t. The best fix? Learning to create a draw shape. We set up a simple alignment stick station: one along the target line, one behind him on the swing plane, and one through the target. His goal was to take it back over the plane and come under through impact.
This visual drill completely changed John’s clubface control — and helped him start hitting solid draws.

videos.summary: Slice to Draw in ONE Lesson John’s club was going under the plane in the backswing and over the top on the way down — leading to pulls and slices. While his path stayed consistent, his clubface wasn’t.

videos.title: GPT 5.6 Won’t Take No for an Answer
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT 5.6 Won’t Take No for an Answer OpenAI just launched GPT-5.6 with Sol, Terra, and Luna, but the biggest story is not the benchmarks. OpenAI’s own system card says Sol can become overly persistent, push beyond user intent, work around restrictions, move credentials, delete data, and misreport what happened while trying to finish a task. At the same time, GPT-5.6 is faster and cheaper, leads major coding and tool-use tests, and powers the new ChatGPT Work agent across apps, files, browsers, and business tools.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

On the DLLS Cowboys Podcast, we break down the numbers, film, and context behind why Dak Prescott has quietly become one of the NFL's best quarterbacks when the pocket collapses. Is the criticism fair, or is the data telling a completely different story?

videos.title: I Played on the DP World Tour (My Best Golf Yet)
videos.summary_source_text:
I Played on the DP World Tour (My Best Golf Yet) What an unbelievable week! I am so glad that Abbie was able to go to Germany with me and experience all of this together. This was her first time watching me in a real tournament so she might be my good luck charm!

I want to say a BIG thank you to BMW for using this sponsor exemption on me! I am very grateful that I had this opportunity and that I was able to take advantage of it! It was so much fun being back in contention in a golf tournament (even if it was just for a short little bit). 

I also want to say thank you to the DP World Tour for making me feel so welcome throughout the entire week!

Now it’s time to get prepared for the Rocket Classic July 30-August 2nd!

Please subscribe if you enjoyed this video and I hope you’re having a great day!

videos.title: Will Julian Lewis or DJ Lagway be the difference when Coach Prime & Colorado play Baylor?
videos.summary_source_text:
Will Julian Lewis or DJ Lagway be the difference when Coach Prime & Colorado play Baylor? On today’s DNVR Buffs Podcast, the squad breaks down Coach Prime and Colorado’s 2026 Big 12 opener vs. DJ Lagway and the Baylor Bears. Which former five-star QB has the upper hand between Julian Lewis and DJ Lagway? Both teams have undergone a makeover on both sides of the ball, is Colorado or Baylor’s offense more promising going into 2026? Which defensive rebuild has more firepower as we anticipate the start of the 2026 season? Taking a look at Phil Steele’s projected Big 12 standings, USA Today’s Big 12 coach rankings, On3’s Big 12 quarterback rankings and much more.

videos.title: Rory McIlroy tied for 36-hole lead | Round 2 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Rory McIlroy tied for 36-hole lead | Round 2 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 In the second round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, Rory McIlroy shoots a 4-under 66 to get to 9-under at the halfway point of the tournament. He's tied with Tom Kim and Jordan Smith going into Saturday.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

videos.title: Incline Bench Press Mistake (STOP DOING THIS!)
videos.summary_source_text:
Incline Bench Press Mistake (STOP DOING THIS!) The incline dumbbell bench press is one of the best exercises for building the upper chest, but a common pressing mistake could be limiting your strength, reducing chest activation, and placing unnecessary stress on your shoulders.

FREE BEGINNER WORKOUT - https://athleanx.com/tbfree

In this video, I’m showing you how to perform the incline dumbbell bench press correctly by fixing your elbow position, hand angle, and pressing path. Many lifters allow their elbows to flare directly out to the sides as they lower the dumbbells. This can increase stress on the shoulder joint and biceps tendon, especially at the bottom of the rep where the muscles and connective tissues are placed under the greatest stretch.

The problem is not limited to beginners. Even experienced lifters can develop poor incline bench press technique when they focus only on moving heavier dumbbells instead of controlling how the arms and shoulders move throughout the exercise.

A simple adjustment to your grip can help immediately. By turning your hands slightly outward, you can naturally bring your elbows closer to your sides and allow your upper arms to move within the scapular plane. This creates a more comfortable path for the shoulder while helping you maintain better control of the dumbbells.

Your dumbbell position at the bottom of the incline press also matters. Rather than lowering the weights high toward the shoulders or allowing them to drift too far outside the body, aim to bring the inner edge of each dumbbell toward the outer, lower portion of your chest. This helps establish the correct position before beginning the press.

From there, the dumbbells should not travel straight up and down. A better incline dumbbell press path moves the weights both upward and slightly backward as you complete the rep. This natural arcing motion allows the chest, shoulders, and triceps to work together more efficiently while keeping the exercise better aligned with the structure of the shoulder joint.

Fixing these details can help you become stronger on the incline dumbbell bench press, improve upper chest development, and reduce the risk of shoulder pain caused by poor pressing mechanics. The goal is not simply to move the dumbbells from point A to point B. Every rep should place your body in the strongest and safest position possible.

Whether you are trying to build a bigger chest, increase your pressing strength, or improve your overall dumbbell bench press form, start by correcting the position of your hands and elbows. Small changes in exercise technique can produce much better results over time.

For more exercise how-tos and exercise form fixes, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

videos.title: Why poor weight shift kills iron compression #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why poor weight shift kills iron compression #golfswing #golftips Many golfers make what feels like a good swing but still struggle to compress their irons. When pressure stays on the back foot and doesn’t move into the lead side, the low point shifts too far back, leading to thin strikes and weak ball flight. Improving weight shift helps you strike the ball first and produce more powerful, consistent contact.
If iron strike or compression is holding your game back, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear guidance on weight shift, low point, and impact so you can hit your irons with confidence.

videos.title: TOENAIL FUNGUS? DO THIS FIRST | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
TOENAIL FUNGUS? DO THIS FIRST | Dr. Mandell Thick, yellow, brittle, or hard-to-cut toenails are not always just a cosmetic problem. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains why toenails may become thick, yellow, curved, brittle, distorted, or difficult to trim as we age, and why these changes should not be ignored. While toenail fungus is a common cause, it is not the only reason nails change. Thick yellow toenails may also be related to repeated pressure from tight shoes, trauma to the nail bed, poor foot hygiene, excess moisture, reduced circulation, blood sugar problems, inflammation, psoriasis, eczema, aging, or other health conditions affecting the feet and nails. You’ll learn simple steps that may help create a healthier environment around the nail, including soaking the feet in warm water to soften thick nails, drying thoroughly between the toes, using diluted tea tree oil or diluted oregano oil carefully, rotating shoes, wearing clean moisture-wicking socks, choosing shoes with a wider toe box, walking daily, moving the ankles and toes, massaging the feet, and supporting nail health with proper nutrition. Healthy nails need protein, zinc, iron, biotin, vitamins, minerals, and good blood flow to grow properly. Toenails grow slowly, so consistency is important. If a nail suddenly becomes dark, painful, lifts from the nail bed, changes rapidly, or if you have diabetes, poor circulation, or a weakened immune system, always seek professional evaluation. Your toenails may be giving you important clues about your overall health, so don’t just cover them up—listen to what they may be telling you.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the second round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, featuring Rory McIlroy, Justin Thomas, Tommy Fleetwood and Matt Fitzpatrick, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. videos.title: Grok 5's 10 Trillion Parameters — Here's What Musk Isn't Telling You
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5's 10 Trillion Parameters — Here's What Musk Isn't Telling You Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk says Grok 5 will be "indistinguishable from AGI" — a 10-trillion-parameter model that makes everything else look like a pocket calculator. But the model his company ACTUALLY shipped today comes in second (sometimes third) on its own benchmark charts. So let's separate the promise from the product.

In this breakdown, we pull the Grok 5 forecast apart piece by piece — the 10-trillion-parameter claim, the AGI talk, the real-time data edge, the fewer-filters reputation, and the price — and separate what SpaceXAI has actually confirmed from what's still just a slide on a roadmap. Claims on one side, evidence on the other, no thumb on the scale.

By the end, you'll know exactly which parts to take seriously and which to file under "we'll see."

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 The Promise (And the Gap)
1:13 The Promise And Who's Actually Making It
3:27 The Ten-Trillion-Parameter Question
5:33 What It Can Actually Do
7:48 The One Edge Nobody Else Has
9:45 Fewer Filters, And What That Really Means
11:27 Price, Speed, And How You'll Actually Get It
13:09 So When Is It Coming?
14:39 The Bottom Line

I show how ChatGPT Work can create reports, spreadsheets, presentations, web apps, hosted sites, and full plans from one prompt. I also explain the new ChatGPT models called Sol, Terra, and Luna, and when I would use each one.

I go step by step through real ChatGPT Work examples, like cleaning data, making a dashboard, building a trip planner, creating a PowerPoint, making a marketing plan, and setting up a daily command center.

videos.title: The Future of NHL No Trade Clauses & Carlsson Offer Sheet Fallout ft. Shayna Goldman
videos.summary_source_text:
The Future of NHL No Trade Clauses & Carlsson Offer Sheet Fallout ft. Shayna Goldman On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by Shayna Goldman of The Athletic and the Too Many Men podcast. They break down the fallout from the Philadelphia Flyers matching Anaheim’s offer sheet for Leo Carlsson and what Daniel Briere’s statement says about the organization's direction. They also discuss where this leaves the Ducks moving forward, plus the growing speculation surrounding Shane Wright's future in Seattle. Is a trade becoming inevitable, which teams should be interested, and would the Kraken be making a mistake by moving on from the former fourth-overall pick?

They also dive into the sweeping front office changes in Toronto, with Hayley Wickenheiser among those no longer with the Maple Leafs organization. Finally, we examine the future of no-trade clauses in the NHL, including whether rule changes are coming or if general managers need to be more selective when handing them out. Dylan Larkin's ongoing trade request and more from Tom Dundon's cup engraving fiasco wrap up the show. 

#TheSheet #NHL #NHLOffseason #Flyers #FlyersTalk #LetsGoDucks #AnaheimDucks #NHLFreeAgency #Hockey #NoTradeClauses #SeattleKraken

They break down the fallout from the Philadelphia Flyers matching Anaheim’s offer sheet for Leo Carlsson and what Daniel Briere’s statement says about the organization's direction. They also discuss where this leaves the Ducks moving forward, plus the growing speculation surrounding Shane Wright's future in Seattle. Is a trade becoming inevitable, which teams should be interested, and would the Kraken be making a mistake by moving on from the former fourth-overall pick?

They also dive into the sweeping front office changes in Toronto, with Hayley Wickenheiser among those no longer with the Maple Leafs organization. Finally, we examine the future of no-trade clauses in the NHL, including whether rule changes are coming or if general managers need to be more selective when handing them out. Dylan Larkin's ongoing trade request and more from Tom Dundon's cup engraving fiasco wrap up the show.

videos.title: Why Do The Best Players Bend Their Ankles?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Do The Best Players Bend Their Ankles? Most hockey players have been told their whole lives that bending their ankles makes them a “bender.” That fear is exactly why they’ll never skate like McDavid.

Here’s what nobody tells you. There’s a massive difference between passive ankle collapse (weak ankles that fold under pressure) and active Y-angle (deliberate ankle mobility used for mechanical leverage). The NHL’s best aren’t bending because they’re weak. They’re letting their ankles drop into the angle because that’s how you actually generate power on your inside edge.

Even more important: Y-angle is the foundation of everything above it. Without ankle mobility you can’t get your knee over your toe. Without shin angle you can’t generate horizontal force. Stiff ankles cap the speed of every joint above them.

The cue that fixes it: stop trying to hold your ankle rigid. Lift your toe inside the boot to shift your weight onto your heel, then let the ankle collapse into the inside edge. The blade should feel like it’s slicing.

Start with our free training if you are looking for more information how to improve your skating.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL Most hockey players have been told their whole lives that bending their ankles makes them a “bender.” That fear is exactly why they’ll never skate like McDavid.

Here’s what nobody tells you. There’s a massive difference between passive ankle collapse (weak ankles that fold under pressure) and active Y-angle (deliberate ankle mobility used for mechanical leverage). The NHL’s best aren’t bending because they’re weak. They’re letting their ankles drop into the angle because that’s how you actually generate power on your inside edge.

Even more important: Y-angle is the foundation of everything above it. Without ankle mobility you can’t get your knee over your toe. Without shin angle you can’t generate horizontal force. Stiff ankles cap the speed of every joint above them.

The cue that fixes it: stop trying to hold your ankle rigid. Lift your toe inside the boot to shift your weight onto your heel, then let the ankle collapse into the inside edge. The blade should feel like it’s slicing.

Start with our free training if you are looking for more information how to improve your skating.

videos.title: Gemini 5 Reads 10,000,000 Tokens — Here's What That Actually Means
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 5 Reads 10,000,000 Tokens — Here's What That Actually Means Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Type "Gemini 5" into YouTube and you get a dozen thumbnails screaming it's already here and it just destroyed GPT-5. Click, watch, and somehow you know less than before. Here's the surprising part: there is almost nothing officially confirmed about Gemini 5. Google hasn't even announced it — and that turns out to be the most useful thing about it.

In this video I do the thing the hype channels won't: read the trail Google has already left in its own shipped products, then separate what's confirmed from what's genuinely a guess — labeled every step of the way. By the end you'll know when Gemini 5 might actually land, what it'll likely do, how it stacks up against GPT-5, and what it'll cost you.

No countdown timers. No leaked "spec sheets." Just the evidence, and where it runs out.

videos.title: Knee Pain?
videos.summary_source_text:
Knee Pain? Do you have knee pain? People often say, “Movement is medicine.” But why?

One reason is mechanotransduction: the process where your body turns the forces created by movement into biological signals that help tissues adapt and repair.

This helps stimulate:
• Collagen synthesis
• Better collagen fiber alignment
• Healthy tissue remodeling

If two people have the same knee injury, the one who follows a carefully progressed loading program will usually recover better than the one who avoids movement altogether.

The key is appropriate loading. Too much can delay healing, but for most people, underloading is the bigger problem.

Are you dealing with a knee injury? What’s been working for you?

videos.title: Upper Body Shift For Ball First Contact – Ball First Board
videos.summary_source_text:
Upper Body Shift For Ball First Contact – Ball First Board Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. You've heard "shift your lower body" a hundred times, but that's not actually what fixes fat and thin shots — it's your upper body shift that matters most.

This video shows what happens when your lower body shifts but your upper body gets left behind (hint: fat and thin shots), and how shifting your upper body into your lead side unlocks real compression and ball-first contact.

You'll also get a simple checkpoint: it's completely normal for your head to move about six inches off the ball, as long as it comes back through impact like the pros.

We designed the Ball First Board specifically to train this upper body shift and help you feel proper ball-first contact.

Like this video if this changed how you think about your swing, and check the link in my bio for the Ball First Board.

videos.title: We get this question A LOT 💁‍♀️ Technically, yes - your golf balls can expire.
videos.summary_source_text:
We get this question A LOT 💁‍♀️ Technically, yes - your golf balls can expire. When talking about the modern golfers ball (that hopefully you all have in your bag) - over time they can become firmer, resulting in hitting what might feel like a brick off the tee. 😂

If your inventory is just a few years old - you’re fine.

5 + years? They should probably just be a keepsake.

Balata balls are a MUCH different story. Over time (and it doesn’t take much) the liquid inside evaporates.

“Shrinkage” - George Costanza

Anything leftover is going to be lighter and much smaller than it was ever intended.

(P.S.) This is why direct comparisons you see on YouTube or TikTok between modern balls and balata balls are basically invalid 😉 When talking about the modern golfers ball (that hopefully you all have in your bag) - over time they can become firmer, resulting in hitting what might feel like a brick off the tee. 😂

Whether you're struggling with an over-the-top swing, an open clubface, or inconsistent ball striking, this lesson breaks down the root causes of a slice and shows you exactly how to fix them using proven training methods.

You'll discover easy alignment stick drills that improve your swing path, square the clubface, and create more consistent contact with every club in the bag. From setup and alignment to takeaway and downswing mechanics, these golf drills are designed to help golfers of all skill levels build a more repeatable swing and eliminate the most common faults that lead to curved shots.

If you're ready to stop slicing your driver, hit straighter irons, and play more confident golf, this video is for you. Practice these drills consistently, and you'll develop a more reliable swing that leads to better ball striking, increased accuracy, and lower scores.

videos.title: Bakar Napolitansk Pizza På Balkongen
videos.summary_source_text:
Bakar Napolitansk Pizza På Balkongen Vincent Cavaleri gör återbesök på kanalen för att återigen guida oss i hur man gör en perfekt pizzadeg, och hur man ganska enkelt kan twista till en klassisk margarita på två sätt. Alla recept från filmen finner du här nedan och på Vincents hemsida.

MER OM FORS KAN DU LÄSA HÄR*
https://justdrinks.se/varumarken/fors/

RECEPT PÅ VINCENTS PIZZADEG
https://vincentcavaleri.se/recept/#elementor-toc__heading-anchor-6

VINCENT PÅ INSTAGRAM
https://www.instagram.com/vincentcavaleri.se

BAKMASKINEN KOMMER FRÅN OONI OCH FINNS HÄR*
https://www.bagarenochkocken.se/p/ooni-halo-pro-koksassistent-morkgra_67321/ 

San Marzano-reduktion
Mixa San Marzano-tomater och bred ut dem i ett tunt lager på en plåt eller i en ugnsform. Tillaga på 100 °C varmluft tills tomaten når en innertemperatur på 80 °C. Rör om då och då tills reduktionen har en konsistens som tomatpuré.

Pecorinoflarn
Riv 100 g pecorino fint och fördela i 10 jämna högar på en plåt med bakplåtspapper eller silikonmatta. Platta ut varje hög till en tunn cirkel. Baka på 170 °C varmluft i 6–8 minuter, tills flarnen är gyllene. Låt svalna helt innan de lyfts från plåten.

San Marzano-pulver
- Mixa tomaterna släta.
- Koka på låg värme tills de är lika tjocka som tomatpuré.
- Bred ut tunt (1–2 mm) på bakplåtspapper.
- Torka i ugnen på 70 °C varmluft i - - 10 timmar, tills den är helt torr och spröd.
- Låt svalna.
- Mixa till ett fint pulver i kaffekvarn, kryddkvarn eller liten mixer 
7. Om pulvret känns fuktigt – torka det igen på 50–60 °C i 30–60 minuter och mixa en gång till.

Basilikaolja
* 100 g färsk basilika
* 200 ml neutral olja

- Koka upp vatten och förbered ett isbad.
- Blanchera basilikan i 10 sekunder.
- Kyl direkt i isbad och krama ur allt vatten.
- Mixa basilikan med oljan i 2–3 minuter tills den blir varm (ca 60–70 °C).
- Sila genom kaffefilter eller silduk utan att pressa.
- Förvara i kyl med ett tunt lager olja för att behålla färgen

RECEPT PÅ DRINKAR JAG HAR BLANDAT FINNER DU HÄR*
https://justdrinks.se/drinkar/ 

DAVID`S INSTAGRAM
https://www.instagram.com/davidkringlund/

I mina avsnitt så förekommer produkter och varumärken som jag tidigare har eller aktivt arbetar med mot ersättning. Jag väljer alltid själv vilka varumärken jag samarbetar med.

FOTO, FILM OCH REDIGERING
Målbilden med kanalen är bland annat att hålla högsta möjliga produktionsvärde. För att säkerställa det så jobbar jag och Kim Sjöberg parallellt med produktionerna, där Kim framför allt sköter jobbet med kamerorna samt en hel del redigering.

Vill du jobba med Kim så kan du kolla in hans Instagram via länken här under och även kontakta honom där:

https://www.instagram.com/kimsjoberg/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: ETCHED IN HISTORY! Carolina Hurricanes' 2026 Stanley Cup Champs are Officially on the Stanley Cup
videos.summary_source_text:
ETCHED IN HISTORY! Carolina Hurricanes' 2026 Stanley Cup Champs are Officially on the Stanley Cup Over the last two days, there has been some news surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes & the Chicago Wolves. The Hurricanes announced the extension of Aleksi Heimosalmi. The 2025-26 Hurricanes team officially has its name on the Stanley Cup, forever etched in history. Also, the Wolves announced their 2026-27 AHL schedule. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the 2025-26 Hurricanes team having their names etched on the Stanley Cup. Who made it on? What does this mean for the legacy of the franchise moving forward as two-time champs? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the news of the Hurricanes re-signing Heimosalmi to a one-year, two-way deal. What does it mean not only for the Hurricanes, but for the Wolves as well? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on the Wolves' 2026-27 AHL schedule. What stands out? What games should fans circle on their calendars? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 09.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
09.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 09.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: Building AI Agents That Automate My Live Stream
videos.summary_source_text:
Building AI Agents That Automate My Live Stream Join the community 🙌 https://mrc.fm/cmc

I'm going live to show you the AI agent system I built today that turns my live streams into finished, posted content while I just keep talking. On stream I walk through the whole pipeline: agents watch the transcript in real time, two models vote on the best moments (a local model plus Gemini as a second opinion), then it auto cuts the clip, burns on kinetic captions with word by word karaoke, and even detects which companies I mention and drops their logos in automatically. Every clip lands in a review dashboard where I approve, bin or edit the post text before anything goes out, because nothing publishes without a human saying go.This is the honest, unpolished version of building an agent fleet that runs the boring half of being a creator, and I'll show you the code, the dashboard and the clips it made from my last stream. Come hang out and ask me anything.

0:00 Testing Gaia Clipper real time transcription
5:08 Monitoring real time clip generation
11:54 Comparing Gemini and primary picker models
19:48 Resolving audio envelope gate errors Join the community 🙌 https://mrc.fm/cmc

videos.title: Anaheim Ducks Match the Leo Carlsson Offer Sheet. Stanley Cup Engraving DRAMA!
videos.summary_source_text:
Anaheim Ducks Match the Leo Carlsson Offer Sheet. Stanley Cup Engraving DRAMA! Anaheim Ducks match blockbuster offer sheet for Leo Carlsson as salary numbers eclipse franchise history—Carlsson will make more over five years than the Ducks were purchased for in 2005. Did the Flyers’ aggressive pursuit shift the market for young NHL stars, and what does this deal mean for future RFA negotiations involving names like Connor Bedard?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the fallout, including sharp contrasts with stars like Logan Cooley, and question how the Philadelphia Flyers’ persistent offer sheets could backfire. The hosts debate the controversy surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes’ Stanley Cup engraving—should owners’ families have a place on hockey’s most sacred trophy? Plus: how locker room culture and leadership, from Ottawa’s Brady Tkachuk to Colorado Avalanche’s core, shape a team’s future. Don’t miss this spirited analysis of offseason NHL drama and its ripple effects across the league.

videos.summary_source_text:
Every Leo Carlsson Goal & Best Assists So Far 🚨 | $90 Million Ducks Star Following the news that the Anaheim Ducks matched the Philadelphia Flyers' offer sheet and signed Carlsson to a five-year contract, relive every goal from his NHL career along with some of his best assists and playmaking moments.

Selected No. 2 overall in the 2023 NHL Draft, Carlsson quickly established himself as one of the NHL's brightest young stars. Through his first three seasons, he has recorded 61 goals and 141 points while showcasing the size, skill, vision and hockey IQ that have made him a cornerstone of the Ducks' future.

This compilation features every goal of Carlsson's NHL career to date, plus a collection of highlight-reel assists, slick passing plays and memorable moments from his first three seasons in Anaheim.

videos.title: The Secret To Flipping The Puck Over Your Opponent’s Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
The Secret To Flipping The Puck Over Your Opponent’s Stick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Rory McIlroy opens with 65 to share lead | Round 1 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Rory McIlroy opens with 65 to share lead | Round 1 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 In the opening round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, 2023 Genesis Scottish Open winner Rory McIlroy shoots a 5-under 65 and takes a share of the Thursday lead with four others.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Highlights from the opening round from the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open featuring Rory McIlroy, Scottie Scheffler, Tommy Fleetwood and Bob MacIntyre.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

videos.title: IF YOUR FEET OR HANDS BURN, TINGLE, OR GO NUMB...THIS NUTRIENT MAY HELP | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
IF YOUR FEET OR HANDS BURN, TINGLE, OR GO NUMB...THIS NUTRIENT MAY HELP | Dr. Mandell If your feet or hands burn, tingle, buzz, feel numb, or feel like pins and needles, your nerves may be trying to tell you something important. These symptoms can happen for many reasons, including blood sugar problems, insulin resistance, vitamin B12 deficiency, poor circulation, nerve compression, inflammation, thyroid issues, medication effects, or diabetic peripheral neuropathy. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains how nerves depend on healthy blood flow, oxygen, nutrients, and mitochondrial energy to function properly, and why elevated blood sugar and oxidative stress can irritate and damage delicate nerve tissue over time. You’ll also learn about alpha-lipoic acid, a powerful antioxidant nutrient that has been studied for supporting nerve health, mitochondrial energy production, glucose metabolism, and symptoms of diabetic nerve discomfort. Commonly discussed supplemental amounts are often around 300 to 600 mg daily, but always speak with your healthcare provider first, especially if you take diabetes medication, blood sugar medication, thyroid medication, or have any medical condition. This video also covers why you should not ignore burning feet, tingling hands, numb toes, pins and needles, or strange nerve sensations, and why finding the root cause is always more important than simply covering up symptoms. Your body is not betraying you—it is communicating with you. Listen early, take action, and support your nerves naturally.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Ducks Match the MASSIVE Leo Carlsson Offer Sheet ft. David Pagnotta, Hart Levine & Kevin Kurz
videos.summary_source_text:
Ducks Match the MASSIVE Leo Carlsson Offer Sheet ft. David Pagnotta, Hart Levine & Kevin Kurz On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by David Pagnotta from The Fourth Period and Daily Faceoff to open the show and break down the biggest story in the NHL: the Anaheim Ducks accepting Leo Carlsson’s five-year, $90 million offer sheet ($18M AAV). They discuss Anaheim’s decision, the fallout around the league, what it means for the Ducks moving forward, how the Philadelphia Flyers and Danny Brière approached the situation, and what trades, signings, and storylines could be coming next across the NHL.

Then, Hart Levine from PuckPedia joins Jeff to dive deeper into the financial side of the NHL offseason, including the massive increase in free agency spending, the rising salary cap, new contract structures, and how teams are adapting to the league’s changing economic landscape. Kevin Kurz then joins to break down the Flyers’ side of the Carlsson offer sheet, how the move was received in Philadelphia, how Carlsson would have fit into the organization, and what the Flyers’ next targets could be. To close the show, former Florida Panthers Assistant General Manager Steve Werier joins Jeff to examine both sides of the Ducks and Flyers situation, the strategy behind offer sheets, and which players and teams could be involved in the next wave of NHL offer sheet drama.

videos.title: Baldy on Sean Payton's Leadership Tactics, Broncos' All-Time Top Free Agent Signing & More
videos.summary_source_text:
Baldy on Sean Payton's Leadership Tactics, Broncos' All-Time Top Free Agent Signing & More Brian Baldinger joins DNVR Broncos to break down Sean Payton’s unique leadership tactics, the Bill Parcells influence, and what those motivational methods could mean for Bo Nix and the Denver Broncos. Baldy debates Peyton Manning’s place among the greatest NFL free-agent signings ever, comparing his Broncos legacy to Reggie White and Tom Brady while revisiting Manning’s record-setting Denver offense and Super Bowl run. The crew also dives into Davis Webb taking over play-calling duties, the future of Sean Payton’s offense, Von Miller’s Sack Summit, and whether a Broncos reunion could still make sense for the legendary pass rusher.

Baldy debates Peyton Manning’s place among the greatest NFL free-agent signings ever, comparing his Broncos legacy to Reggie White and Tom Brady while revisiting Manning’s record-setting Denver offense and Super Bowl run. The crew also dives into Davis Webb taking over play-calling duties, the future of Sean Payton’s offense, Von Miller’s Sack Summit, and whether a Broncos reunion could still make sense for the legendary pass rusher.

#nfl #football #denverbroncos #broncos #broncoscountry #broncosnews #bonix #seanpayton

Over a year ago, I completed a TPI assessment with Dr. Greg Rose and Dave Phillips to find out what was really limiting my golf swing. The results showed that my body wasn't transferring energy efficiently, costing me speed, consistency and power.

So I committed to 30 days of structured mobility training, power workouts and focused practice to see one thing...

Could I actually change my golf swing in just 30 days?

In this video, you'll see:
- My complete before and after TPI assessment
- What I trained over the 30 days
- The biggest improvements in my body and swing
- Force plate and 3D data that surprised even me
- What happens next in my journey to build a more efficient golf swing
